description: Skye and May, still evading Hydra, reflect on May's decision to help Skye and the fallout from the Patriot's death. May admits she saw the building collapse on the Patriot, confirming his demise. Skye, feeling the aftereffects of Terrigenesis, tries to keep her powers under control as they head for their Resistance rendezvous.

transcript.line: So, why exactly did you help me? Last time I checked, you weren't really rooting for team Inhuman.
When an enemy sacrifices his life for yours, you have to question if you're fighting for the wrong side. Seeing that building collapse on The Patriot, I...
I know what he meant to the Resistance.
No. It's not just that. He... We lost one.
Mourn later. Right now, I need your head in the game.
I'm trying. Still feeling the after-effects of the Terrigen. It's like a hangover made of bees.
I've seen what Terrigenesis does to people. What I don't get is how you can control your powers so quickly.
What the hell does that mean?
It means... You know what? I'm not gonna go there. Just... Just keep moving.
The Resistance must have a base of operation. Where is it?
No idea. All I know is a time and place to make contact. We just have to get there.
